languages.text: {n}Вы припоминаете мир-улей Меров, но расположен он в секторе Каликсис, отрезанном от Простора Коронус ныне непроходимым Зевом.{/n}
{n}You know of the hive world of Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, which is cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы припоминаете мир-улей Меров, но расположен он в секторе Каликсис, отрезанном от Простора Коронус ныне непроходимым Зевом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴというハブワールドは知っていますが、それはキャリクシス星域に位置し、今は通れないマウによってコロヌス・エクスパンスから隔てられています。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know of the hive world Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merov kovan dünyasını biliyorsun ama orası Calixis Sektörü'nde ve artık geçilemeyen Ağız tarafından Koronus Enginliği'nden koparılmış durumda.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know of the hive world of Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, which is cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Merov kovan dünyasını biliyorsun ama orası Calixis Sektörü'nde ve artık geçilemeyen Ağız tarafından Koronus Enginliği'nden koparılmış durumda.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你听说过巢都世界梅罗夫，但它位于卡利西斯星区，被如今无法通行的巨口彻底阻隔于科罗努斯扩区之外。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know of the hive world of Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, which is cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你听说过巢都世界梅罗夫，但它位于卡利西斯星区，被如今无法通行的巨口彻底阻隔于科罗努斯扩区之外。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du weißt von der Makropolwelt Merov, allerdings befindet sich diese im Calixis-Sektor, der aufgrund des mittlerweile unpassierbaren Schlundes von der Koronus-Ausdehnung abgeschnitten ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You know of the hive world of Merov, but it is located in the Calixis Sector, which is cut off from the Koronus Expanse by the now impassable Maw.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du weißt von der Makropolwelt Merov, allerdings befindet sich diese im Calixis-Sektor, der aufgrund des mittlerweile unpassierbaren Schlundes von der Koronus-Ausdehnung abgeschnitten ist.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous avez déjà entendu parler du monde ruche de Merov, mais il est situé dans le secteur Calixis, désormais coupé des Étendues de Koronus par l'infranchissable Gueule.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Has oído hablar del mundo colmena de Merov, pero está situado en el sector Calixis, separado de la Extensión de Koronus por las impenetrables Fauces.{/n}
